arguments.argument: textAmount+=round(zoneWidth/6)+round(zoneHeight/8) for(i=0;i<round(zoneWidth/12)+round(zoneHeight/16);i+=1) { var tRanValue; tRanValue=irandom(10) if tRanValue<=2 textScramble+="0101" else if tRanValue>=3 and tRanValue<=5 textScramble+="1010" else if tRanValue>=6 and tRanValue<=7 textScramble+="0011" else if tRanValue>=8 textScramble+="1100" }
